bio: Cybersecurity analyst dedicated to protecting systems, networks, and data from digital threats. Passionate about identifying vulnerabilities, strengthening defenses, and ensuring organizational security compliance.
name: ALEX RIVERA
title: Cybersecurity Analyst

projects.title: Vulnerability Scanner
